projectDescription: An AI-powered Mandarin Chinese conversation tutor with a 3D avatar, HSK vocab practice, and multi-platform support (web and Electron desktop).
keyFeatures: Real-time spoken Mandarin conversation using OpenAI GPT-4o Realtime API (WebRTC)
3D animated tutor avatar with lip-sync visemes and natural blinking (Three.js)
Multi-script display: Hanzi, Pinyin with tone marks, and optional English translation
HSK 1–5 vocabulary practice with built-in word list browser and review tab
Customizable tutor persona (Friendly Coach, Cheerful Partner, Strict Teacher)
TTS via OpenAI (with browser TTS fallback) and STT via Whisper
Electron desktop app packaged as a single portable Windows .exe
Cross-platform support: Windows, Linux (including Raspberry Pi), and macOS
publicApiSurface: POST /api/chat — send messages to GPT chat completion
POST /api/tts — synthesize speech audio from text
POST /api/stt — speech-to-text transcription (alias for /api/whisper with language header)
POST /api/realtime-session — obtain ephemeral token for OpenAI Realtime API
GET /api/hsk?levels=1,2,3 — fetch HSK vocabulary items by level
GET /api/health — check OpenAI connectivity and TTS availability
GET /api/diag/fs — filesystem diagnostics for debugging deployments
buildSystemPrompt(settings, vocab) — builds the AI system prompt for the tutor
buildTutorPrompt(settings, {vocabulary, vocabBiasText}) — full tutor prompt with vocab bias
startServer(options) — start the Express server programmatically
